entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: social network used for professional connections

entities.name: Pattern Analyzer
entities.context: tool for analyzing patterns in data

entities.name: Enriched Contact
entities.context: contact information enriched with additional data

entities.name: New/Updated Contacts
entities.context: contacts that have been newly added or updated

relationships.context: Gmail API is used by the Email Scanner
Email Scanner feeds into the Auto Enrichment process
Auto Enrichment provides data for the Pattern Analyzer
Auto Enrichment results in Enriched Contacts
Enriched Contacts are part of New/Updated Contacts
New/Updated Contacts contribute to the Weekly Review Digest
Weekly Review Digest is reviewed in V Reviews
V Reviews lead to SMS Notifications
V Reviews inform the process of applying verified tags
Applying Verified Tags leads to Updating Profiles
Updating Profiles results in Syncing with CRM
Howie Context API provides a Query Interface
